seoTitle: Diamondvale vs Dicky Beach — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Diamondvale and Dicky Beach. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Diamondvale vs Dicky Beach: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Diamondvale and Dicky Beach.
heading: Diamondvale vs Dicky Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Diamondvale, Queensland and Dicky Beach, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Diamondvale has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Dicky Beach (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Diamondvale or Dicky Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Diamondvale has a flood risk score of 56/100, while Dicky Beach scores 35/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Diamondvale scores 56/100 for bushfire risk. Dicky Beach scores 52/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Diamondvale or Dicky Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Diamondvale has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
